---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Membrane
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case that this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have described a clear use case for this feature.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional).
